nodes.name: Moustached grass warbler
nodes.summary: Moustached grass warbler（Melocichla mentalis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Moustached grass warbler。

nodes.name: Moustached grass warbler
nodes.summary: The moustached grass warbler (Melocichla mentalis) is a species of African warbler, formerly placed in the family Sylviidae. It is widely found throughout Sub-Saharan Africa, although absent in southern parts of the continent. Its natural habitats are moist savanna and subtropical or tropical moist shrubland. References External links Moustached grass warbler - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
